div.class: absolute right-0 top-full hidden w-60 pt-1 group-hover:block
rounded border border-mercury bg-white p-3 text-xs font-normal text-black
div.p: How search works in the Security Help Center:

ul.li: The most relevant topics (based on weighting and matching to search terms) are listed first in the search results by default
Use double quotes to find a phrase (“specific phrase”)
Apply facets on the Search Results page to further scope search results by category

div.class: hidden absolute border-1 top-10 mt-4 mb-5 ml-5 mr-0 right-0 min-w-72 pt-4 pl-4 pr-3 group z-30
card pt-3 pr-4 pl-4 rounded-md border-apple border-4 shadow-2xl

p.strong: Log In to the Cisco Security Documentation Portal

div.class: flex flex-row mb-6 justify-between align-middle items-center
div.label: I am a Cisco...

select.name: account
select.class: bg-white focus:ring-cornflower ring-2 w-2/3 text-ship-grey text-lg

button.class: button w-full sm:w-auto border-0 hover:bg-white hover:text-ship-grey transition-all
button w-full sm:w-auto bg-primary border-primary text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-primary transition-all

div.class: mb-2 rounded-md bg-white px-8 py-6 shadow-lg h-full
absolute mt-1 lg:relative lg:flex lg:h-full lg:flex-col

a.class: mx-1 hidden text-sm font-normal text-ship-grey lg:inline-block

div.class: border-1 absolute -left-4 z-10 hidden min-w-72 rounded-md border-mercury bg-white p-4 shadow-md lg:static lg:block lg:min-w-0 lg:rounded-none lg:border-0 lg:p-0 lg:shadow-none

strong.a: What's New in Security Cloud Control

div.a: Welcome to Cisco Security Cloud Control
Overview of Cisco Security Cloud Control
Products and Solutions Supported by Security Cloud Control

div.class: flex items-start py-1 border-r-4 border-r-primary text-primary

div.a: AI Defense Adopts New AI Threat Taxonomy
AI Defense Hybrid Deployment on Azure
Firewall MSP Portal Now Integrated into Security Cloud Control
New Smart Licensing Dashboard for MSSP Portal
Multitenant Device Upgrades in MSSP Portal
Switch from Google Authenticator to Duo MFA
Talos Threat Intelligence Now Embedded in Security Cloud Control
Security Cloud Control User Interface Changes
New AI Runtime batch event retrieval API
Better reporting of AI Runtime events
Support for runtime protection of Japanese content
Support for validation of Japanese language models
Multicloud Defense Updates in Security Cloud Control
Multicloud Defense Updates in Security Cloud Control
Five new AI Assistant skills for Secure Access
Updates to Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center
New Health Dashboard for MSSP Portal
Updates to Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center
MSSP Device Upgrades Using Public APIs
Security Cloud Control Now Manages Catalyst SD-WAN NGFW features
Introducing Tiered Subscription Model for Cisco Security Analytics and Logging
CLI Support for Firewall Threat Defense Devices Managed by Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center
Introducing Device Health Metrics for Secure Firewall ASA Devices
Security Cloud Control Firewall Management Now Manages Catalyst SD-WAN NGFW Features
Security Cloud Control Firewall Management Notifications in Microsoft Teams
Updates to Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center
Security Cloud Control Firewall Management Video
MSSP Portal: Enhanced Pagination and Sorting of Security Devices
Updates to Security Cloud Control Firewall Manager APIs
Updates to the Event Log Search Feature
Updates to the Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center Device Backups
Updates to Cloud-Delivered Firewall Management Center
Enhanced Event Searching with Sample Filters
Cisco Security Cloud Control Integrated Platform is Now Available
New Widgets in Storage Utilization Dashboard
New Support for the United Arab Emirates (UAE) Cloud Region
Enabling Cisco Multicloud Defense in Security Cloud Control Organization
Activating Trial on a Paid Subscription
Resend Activation Email to New Users
Import users from a CSV file
Retain user roles on product deactivation
Universal Zero Trust Network Access in Firewall Management and Secure Access
Security Cloud Control Firewall Management Documentation

Cisco Support Access to your Organization
